tagalogDescription: Dalhin mo ang pandesal kay Aling Nena sa bahay kubo. Hindi pa siya nakakain ngayong umaga.
englishDescription: Bring the pandesal to Aling Nena at the bahay kubo. She hasn't eaten this morning yet.

tagalogDescription: Dalhin mo ang kape kay Padre Miguel sa simbahan. Kailangan niya ng pampagising.
englishDescription: Bring the coffee to Padre Miguel at the church. He needs something to wake him up.

tagalogDescription: Dalhin mo ang bangus kay Ate Merly sa sari-sari store. Pang-ulam niya iyon ngayong gabi.
englishDescription: Bring the milkfish to Ate Merly at the sari-sari store. That's her dinner tonight.

tagalogDescription: Dalhin mo ang suka kay Kuya Jojo sa palengke. Kailangan niya para sa sawsawan ng isda.
englishDescription: Bring the vinegar to Kuya Jojo at the market. He needs it for his fish dipping sauce.

tagalogDescription: Dalhin mo ang yelo kay Tatay Andoy sa dalampasigan. Para sa mga isda niya, kailangan mapanatiling sariwa.
englishDescription: Bring the ice to Tatay Andoy at the beach. It's for his fish, they need to stay fresh.
